title: lonchitis mannii
intro: Lonchitis mannii, also known as Sanguisorba officinalis, is a perennial plant species in the rose family (Rosaceae), commonly found in Europe and Asia. It has been utilized for centuries due to its medicinal properties, particularly for its astringent and anti-inflammatory effects, which are attributed to the tannins and flavonoids present in the plant. The health benefits of Lonchitis mannii include treating digestive issues, such as diarrhea and dysentery, as well as its use as a topical application for wounds and skin irritations. Herbal preparations of Lonchitis mannii include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
